title: Space Marine Weaponry
description: An addon for Vic's Point Blank that adds weaponry used by Warhammer 40K Space Marines!
body:
An expansion pack for the mod Vic's Point Blank!

 

Unleash your inner space marine with this Warhammer 40,000 gun pack! It includes a bolter, a bolt pistol, a storm bolter, a chainsword, custom ammo, and 3 skins for each weapon! Do you want to be a son of Guilliman, in the form of an Ultramarine, or do you want to be loyal to Rogal Dorn as an Imperial Fist? Would it fit you better to be fighting for Vulkan as a Salamander, or do you want to fight for the Blood Ravens and their primarch Mikael Corveda? It's up to you, my friend!

 

How to download:

Make a folder named "pointblank" in your Minecraft installation (make sure you have Vic's Point Blank and Geckolib installed!). Download the zip file, place it into the pointblank folder, and you're done!
